---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for this project
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

A clear and concise description of the problem or gap this feature would address.
_E.g. "I find it frustrating when..."_

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

List any alternative approaches you've considered and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
